member.name: T:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusHealthCheckOptions
member.summary: Base class for configuration options for descendants of the class.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusHealthCheckOptions.ConnectionString
member.summary: The azure service bus connection string.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusHealthCheckOptions.FullyQualifiedNamespace
member.summary: The azure service bus fully qualified namespace.
member.remarks: Must be used in conjunction with the property.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusHealthCheckOptions.Credential
member.summary: The token credential for authentication.
member.remarks: Must be used in conjunction with the property.

member.name: T:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueHealthCheckOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueHealthCheckOptions.QueueName
member.summary: The name of the queue to check.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueHealthCheckOptions.UsePeekMode
member.summary: Will use PeekMessageAsync method to determine status if set to (default), otherwise; will use GetProperties* method.
member.remarks: Peek requires Listen claim to work. However, if only Sender claim using the Azure built-in roles (RBAC) Azure Service Bus Data Sender is used set this to . By default .

member.name: T:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueMessagesCountThreshold
member.summary: Threshold configuration options for .

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueMessagesCountThreshold.DegradedThreshold
member.summary: Number of active/dead letter Service Bus messages in the queue before message health check returned .

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueMessagesCountThreshold.UnhealthyThreshold
member.summary: Number of active/dead letter Service Bus messages in the queue before message health check returned .

member.name: T:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueMessagesCountThresholdHealthCheckOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueMessagesCountThresholdHealthCheckOptions.ActiveMessages
member.summary: Threshold configuration for active messages queue.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusQueueMessagesCountThresholdHealthCheckOptions.DeadLetterMessages
member.summary: Threshold configuration for dead letter messages queue.

member.name: T:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionHealthCheckHealthCheckOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionHealthCheckHealthCheckOptions.SubscriptionName
member.summary: The subscription name of the topic subscription to check.

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusSubscriptionHealthCheckHealthCheckOptions.UsePeekMode
member.summary: Will use PeekMessageAsync method to determine status if set to (default), otherwise; will use GetProperties* method.
member.remarks: Peek requires Listen claim to work. However, if only Sender claim using the Azure built-in roles (RBAC) Azure Service Bus Data Sender is used set this to . By default .

member.name: T:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusTopicHealthCheckOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for .

member.name: P:HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus.Configuration.AzureServiceBusTopicHealthCheckOptions.TopicName
member.summary: The name of the topic to check.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AzureServiceBusHealthCheckBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to configure , , , , .
Add a health check for specified Azure Service Bus Queue.
member.param: The .
The azure service bus connection string to be used.
The name of the queue to check.
An optional action to allow additional Azure Service Bus configuration.
The health check name. Optional. If null the type name 'azurequeue' will be used for the name.
The that should be reported when the health check fails. Optional. If null then the default status of will be reported.
A list of tags that can be used to filter sets of health checks. Optional.
An optional representing the timeout of the check.

member.summary: Add a health check for specified Azure Service Bus Queue.
member.param: The .
A factory to build the azure service bus connection string to be used.
A factory to build the queue name to check.
An optional action to allow additional Azure Service Bus configuration.
The health check name. Optional. If null the type name 'azurequeue' will be used for the name.
The that should be reported when the health check fails. Optional. If null then the default status of will be reported.
A list of tags that can be used to filter sets of health checks. Optional.
An optional representing the timeout of the check.

member.summary: Add a health check for specified Azure Service Bus Queue.
member.param: The .
The azure service bus fully qualified namespace to be used, format sb://myservicebus.servicebus.windows.net/.
The name of the queue to check.
The token credential for authentication.
An optional action to allow additional Azure Service Bus configuration.
The health check name. Optional. If null the type name 'azurequeue' will be used for the name.
The that should be reported when the health check fails. Optional. If null then the default status of will be reported.
A list of tags that can be used to filter sets of health checks. Optional.
An optional representing the timeout of the check.

member.summary: Add a health check for specified Azure Service Bus Queue.
member.param: The .
A factory to build the azure service bus fully qualified namespace to be used, format sb://myservicebus.servicebus.windows.net/.
A factory to build the name of the queue to check.
A factory to build the token credential for authentication.
An optional action to allow additional Azure Service Bus configuration.
The health check name. Optional. If null the type name 'azurequeue' will be used for the name.
The that should be reported when the health check fails. Optional. If null then the default status of will be reported.
A list of tags that can be used to filter sets of health checks. Optional.
An optional representing the timeout of the check.

member.summary: Add a health check for specified Azure Service Bus Queue active or dead letter messages threshold.

The name of the queue to check.
The health check name. Optional. If null the type name 'azurequeuethreshold' will be used for the name.
An optional action to allow additional Azure Service Bus configuration.
The that should be reported when the health check fails. Optional. If null then the default status of will be reported.
A list of tags that can be used to filter sets of health checks. Optional.
An optional representing the timeout of the check.

member.summary: Add a health check for specified Azure Service Bus Queue active or dead letter messages threshold.

The token credential for authentication.
An optional action to allow additional Azure Service Bus configuration.
The health check name. Optional. If null the type name 'azurequeuethreshold' will be used for the name.

member.name: T:ApiMarker
member.summary: Used for test purposes only.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.NotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that an output will not be null even if the corresponding type allows it. Specifies that an input argument was not null when the call returns.

member.name: M:Guard.ThrowIfNull``1(``0,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if is null.
member.param: The reference type argument to validate as non-null.
Only applicable to strings.
The name of the parameter with which corresponds.
